supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 1 profitable and 8 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -62.75, and worst fold rw_008 net PnL -32.89.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by -3.97 total net PnL across 4 better and 5 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.
